code:
%%{FinTech_FraudDetection}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_LedgerService] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {FinTech_AuthVault] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech FraudDetection系统画一个状态图，核心场景是交易流量的录制和回放。整个流程从LedgerService启动开始，先有个Idle状态，然后可以进入Recording录制或者Loading加载已有会话。
明白了，Idle是起始状态。那录制过程中如果用户暂停，应该有个Paused状态对吧？还有停止录制后数据要保存，这里我理解为Saving状态，保存完再回到Idle。
对，Paused和Recording之间可以双向切换，Resume就能恢复。另外停止录制时，不管是从Recording还是Paused，都要走Saving。加载会话完成后到Ready状态，然后可以Playing回放。
回放部分我也需要暂停功能，但为了避免和录制那边的Paused混淆，我建议叫Paused2。回放停止后回到Ready，关闭会话再回Idle。这样两条主线就清晰了。
Paused2可以。Recording内部我想细化一下：用AuthVault做认证，然后进入Capturing抓包，收到Packet就循环在Capturing，Buffer满了触发BufferFull状态，然后Auto-flush到Flushing，完成后再回到Capturing。
好，Recording的子状态结构我画好了。Playing这边我也对应设计：TransactionQueue进入Emitting发包，发完一个到Waiting等delay，或者直接发最后一个包回到AuthVault做校验。
最后加两个note吧。Recording右边注明捕获的字段：Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON、Action name。Playing那边写回放选项：速度0.5x到4x、Seek定位、Step步进、Filter过滤。
都加上了。整个状态图现在覆盖了从LedgerService启动、录制交易流量、保存会话、加载回放到最终关闭的完整生命周期，Recording和Playing的内部细节也都通过子状态表达清楚了。
